user.title: Set up Schellenberg USB Stick
user.description: Enter the serial port path for your Schellenberg USB stick.

usb_confirm.title: Confirm Schellenberg USB Stick
usb_confirm.description: Confirm the serial port path for your discovered Schellenberg USB stick.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the serial port
error.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again and ensure you press the pairing button on your blind motor.

abort.no_hub: No USB hub found. Please set up the USB hub first.

menu_options.delegate: Pair a motor that's already paired with a remote

manual_add.title: Add blind by transmit address
manual_add.description: Enter the 2-character hex transmit address (enum slot) the motor already listens to. Example: 10, 1A, 2B.

manual_position.title: Set initial position
manual_position.description: Where is {device_name} right now? This sets the starting position for the position slider. Note: positioning for timed motors uses a default travel time and is uncalibrated until calibration support is added in a later update.

delegate.title: Put motor in learn mode
delegate.description:
To pair a motor that already responds to a remote, you need to put it in learn mode first:

1. Press the **P** (program) button on the back of your remote.
2. Press **Stop** on the remote — the motor will jog briefly to confirm it is in learn mode.
3. Once you see the motor jog, press Next within 30 seconds.

delegate_transmit.title: Send pairing command
delegate_transmit.description: The motor is in learn mode. Click Transmit to send the pairing handshake from Home Assistant. The motor will jog once more to acknowledge the new command.

delegate_name.title: Name your motor
delegate_name.description: Give this motor a friendly name so you can identify it in Home Assistant.

delegate_position.title: Set initial position
delegate_position.description:
Pairing command sent. A silent motor cannot confirm it worked — after saving, test it by pressing Open in Home Assistant. If {device_name} does not move, retry pairing.

Where is {device_name} right now?

pair.title: Pair a new device
pair.description: Press the pair button to activate pairing mode on your Schellenberg USB stick. Then press the pairing button on your blind motor within 2 minutes.

name_device.title: Name your device
name_device.description:
Pairing successful! Device ID: {device_id}

Please provide a friendly name for this blind.

calibration_close.title: Step 1: Close the blind
calibration_close.description: First, ensure {device_name} is fully closed (all the way down). Press 'Next' when ready.

calibration_open_instruction.title: Step 2: Open the blind
calibration_open_instruction.description: Now we will measure how long it takes to open {device_name}. Press Start **then** press the open button on the control to start measuring. There is no need to rush, the timer does not start until we receive a moving up message from the blinds.

calibration_close_instruction.title: Step 3: Close the blind
calibration_close_instruction.description: Now we will measure how long it takes to close {device_name}. Press Start **then** press the close button on the control to start measuring. There is no need to rush, the timer does not start until we receive a moving down message from the blinds.

calibration_complete.title: Calibration complete
calibration_complete.description:
Calibration for {device_name} complete!

Measured times:
- Open time: {open_time} seconds
- Close time: {close_time} seconds

These times will be used to accurately track the blind position.

timed_cal_precondition.title: Step 1: Precondition
timed_cal_precondition.description: Before calibrating {device_name}, make sure the shutter is fully open (at the top). Press Next when the shutter is in the fully open position.

timed_cal_close.title: Step 2: Time the closing run
timed_cal_close.description: {device_name} is now closing. Press Submit when the shutter has fully reached the bottom end position.

timed_cal_open.title: Step 3: Time the opening run
timed_cal_open.description: {device_name} is now opening. Press Submit when the shutter has fully reached the top end position.

timed_cal_confirm.title: Confirm calibration
timed_cal_confirm.description:
Calibration for {device_name} measured!

Measured times:
- Close time: {close_time} s
- Open time: {open_time} s

Press Done to save, or check Redo to repeat the measurement. If you redo, first return the shutter to the fully open position via your remote.

data.redo: Redo measurement (return shutter to fully open first)

listen_first.title: Listening for remote press
listen_first.description: Press any button on the remote you want to bind to {device_name}. Waiting for the first press…

listen_second.title: Confirm remote press
listen_second.description: Press the same button again to confirm.

listen_timeout.title: No remote detected
listen_timeout.description: No button press was received. Check that the remote is within range and try again.

listen_confirm.title: Bind remote to {device_name}?
listen_confirm.description: Remote **{remote_id}** was detected twice. Bind it to {device_name}?

listen_confirm_migrate.title: Add channel to {device_name}?
listen_confirm_migrate.description: Remote **{remote_id}** was detected twice. Its other channel currently controls **{other_motor_name}**, which will keep working. Add this channel to {device_name}?

remove_confirm.title: Remove remote from {device_name}?
remove_confirm.description: This will remove the remote binding from {device_name}. The remote event entity will disappear and position tracking triggered by that remote will stop.

error.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again and ensure you press the pairing button on your blind motor.
error.delegation_failed: Pairing command failed — the stick did not respond in time, was busy, or got disconnected. Make sure the motor is in learn mode, then try again.
error.device_limit_reached: Device limit reached. This stick can address about 240 motors and all slots are in use. Remove an unused motor before adding a new one.
error.calibration_timeout: Calibration timed out. The blind took more than 5 minutes to complete the movement. Please check the device and try again.
error.calibration_start_timeout: Timeout waiting for the blind to start moving. Please ensure the device is properly connected and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during calibration. Please try again.
error.invalid_enum_format: Transmit address must be exactly 2 hexadecimal characters (e.g. 10, 1A, 2B).
error.duplicate_enum: A blind with this transmit address is already added to the integration.
error.timed_cal_too_short: Run was too short (less than 2 seconds) — likely a double-press or misfire. Please return the shutter to the fully open position via your remote, then try again.
error.timed_cal_too_long: Run exceeded 120 seconds — the shutter may have been left running. Please return the shutter to the fully open position via your remote, then try again within 2 minutes.
error.remote_is_motor: That button is registered to a motor, not a remote — choose a different button.
error.remote_already_bound: That remote button is already bound to {other_motor_name} — unbind it there first, then try again.
error.remote_press_mismatch: The two presses did not match — please try again.
error.remote_capture_timeout: No remote detected — press a button within the listening window.
error.remote_capture_disconnected: The USB stick disconnected — reconnect and try again.
error.hub_not_loaded: The USB hub is not loaded. Please check the hub setup and try again.

abort.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again.
abort.device_not_found: The selected device could not be found. Please try again.
abort.timed_cal_incomplete: Calibration is incomplete — the open and close times were not both measured. Please start the calibration again.

init.title: Schellenberg USB
init.description: Edit the serial port path for the Schellenberg USB hub.

data_description.ignore_unknown: When enabled, signals from devices not added to this integration (e.g. handheld remotes) are silenced in the log.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the serial port

pair.name: Pair device
pair.description: Activate pairing mode on the Schellenberg USB stick to pair a new blind motor. After calling this service, press the pairing button on your blind motor within 10 seconds.

uncalibrated_motor.title: {device_name} is using the default travel time

confirm.title: Calibrate {device_name}
confirm.description:
**{device_name}** has not been timed-calibrated and uses a default travel time of 60 seconds — the position slider may be inaccurate.

To fix this, go to **Settings → Devices & Services → Schellenberg USB**, select the device, click **Configure**, and follow the timed calibration steps.
